description: Builtin-named READ leaked as content for a tool NOT on this agent's surface: search_documents is a real BUILTIN_TOOLS entry, but the harness wires no SEARCH_DOCUMENTS connector, so the tool was never offered to the model. Provenance: the 2026-06-10 per-agent disposition fix (companion to leaked-capability-read-recovered) -- 'known' now means THIS agent instance's tool surface, not the static builtin list, so an off-surface builtin name dispositions exactly like a hallucinated name: suppressed at the loop seam, never executed, never re-entered (fail-closed, R9/U6).
user_messages: Find the bearing replacement procedure for P-201
